title: Top 5 flexi cap mutual funds to consider for SIP in a volatile market
summary: Flexi cap funds are types of equity mutual funds that invest at least 65% of their collected money in equity and related instruments. They invest across large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap stocks.

title: I gave ChatGPT a ₹10,000 budget for a summer trip — Here’s whether It chose Goa or Puducherry
summary: Goa is ideal for energetic group vacations with nightlife and beach activities, while Puducherry offers affordability and relaxation. title: Ladli Behna Yojana: Can married, salaried women and government employees apply? Check income limits, eligibility
summary: Madhya Pradesh's Ladli Behna Yojana offers ₹1,250 monthly to over 1.25 crore women. Government employees are ineligible, while salaried women in private jobs can apply if their family income is below ₹2.5 lakhs. The scheme promotes women's economic empowerment since its launch in June 2023.

title: Daily SIP vs monthly SIP vs quarterly SIP: The best choice depends on this one factor – Experts decode
summary: Investing through SIPs, it's essential to prioritize consistency and cash flow over frequency. Monthly SIPs are preferred for their efficiency and discipline, offering similar long-term returns as daily SIPs, while quarterly SIPs may underperform due to longer idle periods before investment.
